message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "TaskControl" as TC
interface "Reins_Agent" as RA
usecase "ExecCommands" as EC
usecase "HostRegistry" as HR

loop [all_clients]
  TC -> RA : [01] identified_key
  activate RA
  RA -> EC : [02] check(identified_key)
  activate EC
  EC -> EC : [03] varid?(identified_key)
  EC --x EC : [04] status
  deactivate EC
  RA -- TC : [05] status
  deactivate RA
  note right of EC : connection check
  note right of EC : logging status
  TC -> HR : [06] rewrite_status(identified_key, status)
  activate HR
  HR -> HR : [07] set_status(identified_key, IPaddress, status)
  HR -> HR : [08] store()
  HR -- TC : [09] true or false
  deactivate HR
end loop

@enduml
